equity.label: S&P 500 equity pressure
equity.note: Bigger equity drawdowns imply more stress.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: A rise in front-end yields can tighten financial conditions.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Higher breakevens imply more inflation pressure.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2025-10-29 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 23.99
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2025-10-29: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 23.99/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-10-29, the score printed 23.99/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
